# Template: Documentation Notes

**Agent:** docs
**Creates:** `docs.md`
**Location:** `.github/work/current/<feature-name>/docs.md`

---

```markdown
# Documentation Notes

## Overview

**Feature/Fix:** <feature-name>
**Documentation Type:** <internal/external/both>
**Status:** <planning/in-progress/review/complete>

## Scope

### Documentation to Create

- [ ] <document or section to create>
- [ ] <document or section to create>

### Documentation to Update

- [ ] <existing document to update>
- [ ] <existing document to update>

### Terminology/UI Review

- [ ] <UI element or term to review>
- [ ] <UI element or term to review>

## Audit of Existing Docs

### Current State

<summary of current documentation state>

### Gaps Identified

- <gap in documentation>
- <gap in documentation>

### Inconsistencies Found

- <terminology or style inconsistency>
- <terminology or style inconsistency>

## Documentation Plan

### Structure

<outline of documentation structure>

### Target Audience

<who this documentation is for>

### Key Terms

| Term | Definition | Usage Notes |
|------|------------|-------------|
| <term> | <definition> | <where/how to use> |

## Progress

### Completed

- [x] <completed item>

### In Progress

- [ ] <current work item>

### Blocked

- [ ] <blocked item> — <reason>

## Technical Accuracy Notes

<notes on technical details verified with code or architect>

## Terminology Decisions

| Context | Decision | Rationale |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| <UI/docs location> | <term chosen> | <why this term> |

## Review Findings

### Issues Found

<issues discovered during review>

### Recommendations

<suggestions for improvement>

## Completion Checklist

- [ ] All planned documentation created/updated
- [ ] Technical accuracy verified
- [ ] Terminology consistency checked
- [ ] Code examples tested
- [ ] Links validated
- [ ] Formatting consistent
- [ ] Ready for review
```
